items.name: Raw Darkness Vultures Hat
items.description:
Collab between Hyacinth UGC and Aeteris Fantasy
Purchase HERE: https://www.roblox.com/games/72687221433834/Exclusives-Limiteds-Hub
-
A hat worn by members of a pop group, many decades ago. This hat was customized for a performance of their hit song, Vulture. After their song rose to fame again due to the viral dance circulating on social media, official hats from the performance were created in honor of the song's resurgence decades later. The hat features a black fabric base, with high-quality resin pieces placed on top, most notably the vulture skull and the bone horns. The rims of the hat are adorned with metal-like spikes placed carefully around them. Lastly, the hat was textured to have a grungy, dark black metal look. Buy some of these hats for yourself!
-
Tags: Onyx, White, Black, Metal, Grunge, Horns, Sparkles, Chrome, Gem, Chains, Emo, y2k, Dark, Matte, Shiny, Cross, Goth, Trendy, Hat, Outlaw, Gun, Bone, Skeleton
